summary: Verified sponsored spots + AdSense scaffold. Backend: sponsored bool present on all restaurants; POST /api/places/search (curated) returns the 3 sponsored seeds (Olive & Ember, Harborline, Ember & Oak BBQ) first (ordered by distance within group), then non-sponsored by distance; POST /api/restaurants accepts and persists sponsored=true; regression on /cuisines, /spin, /restaurants delete all pass. Frontend: keyless spin renders result card + Nearby grid with 3 sponsored badges at top in the expected order; AdUnit renders null while REACT_APP_ADSENSE_PUB_ID is empty (no crash, no console errors beyond harmless ResizeObserver noise); Add spot dialog with Sponsored toggle creates a new restaurant that is immediately prepended to the grid with a Sponsored badge; respin and Clear still work. 20/20 pytest backend tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: AdUnit.jsx: 'Sponsored' label above the grid (label='Sponsored') could be confusing next to sponsored restaurant badges — consider label='Advertisement' when it becomes visible, to avoid conflating ads with sponsored restaurant listings.

Home.jsx: onAdded prepends new items to results, but if a non-sponsored spot is added while sponsored items already lead the list, sort ordering (sponsored-first) is not preserved on the client. Minor UX inconsistency.

Backend seed uses 3 sponsored items but places_search sorts them purely by distance within the sponsored group, so pinned order can shift if their distances change. If a stable pinned order is desired, add an explicit priority field.
Prior comment carries: CUISINES list in Home.jsx no longer includes 'Sushi' (already fixed / aligned).
seed_data_creation: None; used seeded 23 restaurants. Test-added rows are cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GOOGLE_API_KEY and REACT_APP_ADSENSE_PUB_ID are intentionally empty. AdUnit must render null unless PUB_ID is set — confirmed. When testing Radix Select inside a modal, click the trigger then use page.get_by_role('option', name=...) — plain text= selectors can hit the CUISINE filter chips behind the dialog. Sponsored badge testids: sponsored-badge-{restaurant.id}. Grid testid: restaurant-grid.
